text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And just so there's no misunderstanding...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If I were the type to throw in the towel so easily, I
would never have come to the academy in the
first place.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
choice_data_list: I won't. I'll be by your side until the end.
I won't. I'll be by your side until the end.
We're doing special training when we get back!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
choice_data_list: I won't. I'll be by your side until the end.
I won't. I'll be by your side until the end.
We're doing special training when we get back!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe... No one said you have to go that far.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But, very well. If we're making heartfelt promises,
then you have my permission to put forth your
utmost effort as my trainer until the very end.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
All so that this first-rate Umamusume can obtain
a victory worthy of the name King Halo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You're absolutely right. We don't have
time to sit around moaning about our failures.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You really do know just what to say
sometimes, don't you?
